name: Recall Engine
description: Ask your entire past from chat, and get abandoned threads surfaced every morning — built on Reflex's cross-conversation search.
author: reflex-agent

slashCommands.label: Ask your past
slashCommands.description: Search every past conversation and answer with citations
slashCommands.promptBlock: The user is asking you to recall something from their own history. Search across journal entries and chat transcripts (use session recall / search across all Spaces), then answer concisely and cite where each fact came from (Space + date). If nothing matches, say so. Question: {payload}

workflows.label: Surface abandoned threads
workflows.description: Each morning at 06:00, find open questions and 'I'll get back to this' moments you never closed.

params.prompt: Search recent journal entries and chat transcripts (your session recall, across all Spaces) from the last 2 weeks for open questions, promises, and 'I'll get back to this' moments the user never closed. Return a short markdown checklist (one line each, with the Space + date). Output nothing if there are none.
